title: More than dinner. A handful of nights you'll keep returning to.
subtitle: From the chef's counter to bespoke private evenings, every format keeps the same obsession at its center.

items.title: Chef's Counter
items.description: Six seats, a direct line to the pass, and dishes that never appear on the public menu.

items.title: Private Dining
items.description: Take the whole room. A bespoke menu shaped around your evening, your guests, your moment.

items.title: Sunday Harvest Brunch
items.description: A slower service centered around the week's final delivery from our regional farms.

items.title: Off-Site Atelier
items.description: We bring the kitchen to you — for milestone evenings, brand dinners, and quiet celebrations.
